news.headline: Vast.ai adds support for Virtual Machines to its cloud GPU platform, enhancing flexibility and accessibility.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Vast.ai, a top cloud GPU platform for AI and ML, revealed the introduction of Virtual Machine (VM) support on its platform. This development highlights Vast.ai's dedication to broadening availability of high-performance computing resources.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: Going forward, we will consider further rate cuts, but anticipate that we will be taking a more gradual approach.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: I expect a lag to business investment boost from rate cuts.
Maturity key for monetary policy success, emphasizes new report.
HKMA alerts of fake sites connected to Chong Hing Bank. Be cautious of fraudulent internet banking screens. (Read more)
news.summary: A caution has been issued by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding fake online platforms connected to Chong Hing Bank Limited. They have highlighted the presence of deceptive websites and internet banking login screens. This alert aims to prevent individuals from falling victim to scams and protect their personal information. It is crucial for people to remain vigilant while accessing online portals associated with Chong Hing Bank Limited to avoid potential fraudulent activities.

news.headline: Bitcoin crosses $100K mark as XRP, Dogecoin, and Solana surge following expected U.S. inflation data.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the price of Bitcoin surged above $100,000 per coin following the release of U.S. inflation data that met predictions. This increase in value also led to a rise in other top cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: The US reacts strongly when others manipulate currencies.
Avitor.ai launches vertical AI agents for private aircraft bookings, boosting productivity and customer experience.
news.summary: Avitor.ai, based in New York, has officially launched its vertical AI agents for private aircraft travel research and bookings. This groundbreaking development provides brokers and online travel agents with autonomous AI agents capable of addressing customer travel inquiries effectively. These agents are equipped with contextual intelligence, enhancing productivity levels and customer satisfaction significantly. This achievement was made possible through Avitor.ai's integration of its advanced Knowledge Hub, marking a new era in the industry.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: We are not expecting a recession.
US Treasury Secretary Yellen: I have serious concerns with broad-based tariffs on Chinese imports.
FBI arrests Alexander Brothers, top real estate brokers, in high-profile case.
Kovrr introduces new standardized methodology to quantify cybersecurity control impact, reducing risk and investment.
news.summary: Cutting-edge techniques have been developed to harmonize controls across multiple cybersecurity frameworks, providing organizations with a comprehensive understanding of how to minimize cybersecurity risks and measure the effectiveness of their investments. On December 11, 2024, in Tel Aviv, Kovrr, a prominent global supplier of real-time cyber risk assessments, unveiled this groundbreaking approach. This innovative methodology merges controls from various frameworks to enhance risk reduction strategies and evaluate the impact of cybersecurity investments, ultimately empowering organizations to make informed decisions.

news.headline: CobbleStone Software extends GSA contract until 2030, maintaining leadership in contract management.
news.summary: CobbleStone Software, a leading provider of contract lifecycle management (CLM) solutions, has announced the renewal and extension of its GSA contract until 2030. The company, headquartered in Princeton, N.J., confirmed the news on December 11, 2024. CobbleStone Software's recognition as a Leader in CLM was highlighted in the SPARK Matrix™ Report. This significant contract renewal underscores the company's commitment to providing top-notch services, ensuring continued support and collaboration with government agencies.

news.headline: Lipsie-TIN Group introduces DeepInto®, AI platform revolutionizing multilingual translation, empowering businesses with innovative solutions.
news.summary: DeepInto® is helping businesses succeed in the current economic environment by offering innovative solutions. With the integration of advanced AI tools, DeepInto® enables businesses to thrive amidst resource constraints and technological advancements.

news.headline: Saddlebrook Resort in Tampa, Florida, reveals a new driving range as part of a $92 million renovation project.
news.summary: A renowned resort in Tampa, Florida, known for housing the esteemed Saddlebrook Academy, has introduced a new driving range crafted by Rees Jones, a globally recognized golf course architect. This development was announced in Wesley Chapel, Florida, on December 11, 2024. Saddlebrook Resort proudly showcases its latest addition to golf enthusiasts and visitors alike.

news.headline: Fizyr wins 2024 Top Software & Tech Award for supply chain automation in the Netherlands.
news.summary: Recognizing the latest software and technology innovations aimed at enhancing the supply chain industry, an award has been presented in DELFT, Netherlands on Dec. 11, 2024. The solutions highlighted focus on automating processes, enhancing efficiency, and improving visibility within the supply chain sector. This recognition comes from Food Logistics, a leading publication devoted solely to this industry.

news.headline: ATMOS Global introduces Quantum Adaptive Governance Evolution Framework (Q-AGE) aiming to revolutionize organizational intelligence.
news.summary: ATMOS Global Pty Ltd, based in Melbourne, Australia, is at the forefront of utilizing exponential artificial intelligence technology. With their mission of "Transforming Boundaries into Limitless Possibilities," ATMOS Global aims to lead the way in innovation. The company, known for their visionary approach, is making significant strides in this field. This news was released on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Van Ness Feldman switches legacy CRM with TRĒ AI, cleansing and enhancing data. Fast deployment achieved.
news.summary: Today, TRĒ AI, a company specializing in the TRĒTM MBD solution for professional services, revealed that Van Ness Feldman, an energy and environmental law firm, has implemented TRĒ to replace its old CRM system. Following a smooth and rapid deployment process, Van Ness Feldman's TRĒ solution improved and optimized their existing system.

news.headline: Texas Tech student Kofi Frimpong-Manson awarded $2,500 STEM scholarship by SBB Research Group Foundation.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 11, 2024, Kofi Frimpong-Manson was chosen as a recipient of the STEM Scholarship by the SBB Research Group Foundation. This prestigious award, totaling $2,500, aims to support students in their efforts to generate innovation and contribute positively to the field of science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.

news.headline: Beyond Capital Ventures invests in Fasal, completing its Fund II portfolio. BENGALURU, India, Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Beyond Capital Ventures (BCV), a venture capital firm focusing on emerging markets, recently disclosed their investment in Fasal. This investment marks the full utilization of BCV Fund II. The announcement was made in BENGALURU, India on December 11, 2024. BCV's commitment to Fasal signifies another successful venture, consolidating their position in the market.

news.headline: Discover Lehigh Valley to host 2025 Ultimate Frisbee High School National Invite at Grange Park, first in Northeast.
news.summary: In a significant milestone, the upcoming 2025 edition of the High School National Invite (HSNI) will be the first time the competition will be held in the Northeast, specifically in Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania. The event, which is now in its seventh year, is considered one of the top competitions in high school ultimate frisbee. This announcement was made by Discover Lehigh Valley on December 11, 2024. The HSNI has garnered recognition for bringing together talented high school players from across the country, with an expected increase in participation and attendance for the 2025 event.

news.headline: SutiSoft Inc. updates SutiProcure with advanced features for procurement, aiming to streamline and accelerate processes.
news.summary: A company known as SutiSoft Inc., specializing in user-friendly web-based solutions for business administration, has introduced enhancements to SutiProcure, its online procure-to-pay management software. The updates were announced on December 11, 2024, from SUNNYVALE, California. These additions offer users increased capabilities in handling procurement processes by providing cutting-edge features.

news.headline: New Square 9 guide addresses government security and compliance. 69% report data governance in initial phase.
news.summary: Improve Information Governance in Your City or Organization NEW HAVEN, Conn., Dec. 11, 2024 - A recent survey conducted by the state's Chief Information Officer (CIO) in 2023 revealed that 69% of participants described their data governance status as being in the initial stages. This statistic underscores the pressing need for significant reforms to enhance data management practices within municipalities and agencies.

news.headline: CYBRA announces MarkMagic 11, new edition of software, widely used by thousands globally.
news.summary: A leading company in barcode technology, label and form printing, and RFID tracking applications, CYBRA Corporation, has introduced MarkMagic 11 to the market. This latest version of the widely used software is now accessible to customers globally. The company, based in Yonkers, New York, made the announcement in December. MarkMagic 11 is anticipated to benefit thousands of users with its updated features and improvements.

news.headline: GumGum achieves global SOC 2 compliance for its platform, setting new data security standards in ad tech.
news.summary: GumGum, a leading technology company prioritizing contextual solutions in digital advertising through AI technology, has successfully obtained SOC 2 compliance for its GumGum Platform™. The accomplishment was announced in Santa Monica, California on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: PKF O'Connor Davies wins 'Accounting/Due Diligence Firm of the Year' at 23rd Annual M&A Advisor Awards for third straight year.
news.summary: For the third year in a row, PKF O'Connor Davies, a leading accounting, tax, and advisory firm in the US, has received prestigious recognition for its Transaction Advisory Services practice. The firm was awarded the top honors in the category of "Accounting/Due" in December 11, 2024. PKF O'Connor Davies stands out as one of the largest practices in the country, showcasing their expertise and commitment to excellence. This achievement marks a significant milestone for the firm, further solidifying its position as a reputable and trusted player in the industry.

news.headline: In 2025, FandF Consultancy is assisting immigrants to secure six-figure tech jobs. Expert-led program aims to provide guidance for high-paying roles.
news.summary: An upcoming session led by experts aims to assist immigrants in securing lucrative tech positions in 2025 and beyond. Scheduled for December 11, 2024, in Montreal, this initiative is organized by FandF Consultancy, a top IT consulting firm in Canada. The session, to be held virtually, will offer invaluable guidance to immigrants, providing them with the knowledge and tools necessary to succeed in obtaining high-paying roles in the tech industry in the coming year and beyond.

news.headline: Municorn's AI food photo recognition app offers instant calorie and macro breakdowns. Revolutionizes meal tracking.
news.summary: A groundbreaking advancement in meal tracking has been introduced by Municorn through their AI-powered Food Photo Recognition technology. This innovation, unveiled in New York on December 11, 2024, has revolutionized the way individuals can track their food intake. The Calorie Counter & Food Tracker App by Municorn now provides instant calorie and macro breakdowns by simply taking a photo. This cutting-edge technology offers quick and accurate nutritional information to users, displaying calorie counts and macronutrient details with unparalleled efficiency.

news.headline: Stellarix reveals brand refresh and new vision to empower clients for future-readiness in NYC on Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: A prominent innovation and strategy consulting company based in New York has introduced a revamped brand along with fresh services aimed at promoting sustainable development and enhancing resilience for long-lasting achievements. On December 11, 2024, Stellarix revealed its updated identity and new offerings to facilitate continued growth and success.

news.headline: EBSCO Clinical Decisions forms Generative AI Advisory Council to guide responsible AI use. Established in June 2024.
news.summary: A diverse panel has been assembled by EBSCO Clinical Decisions to provide specialized advice on the ethical application of Artificial Intelligence (AI). Based in Ipswich, Mass., the Generative AI Advisory Council was formed in June 2024. This initiative aims to ensure responsible deployment of AI technologies.

news.headline: Spearhead Global partners with Vetreria Etrusca to innovate glass bottle packaging for spirits, launching co-branded catalog.
news.summary: A prominent Italian glass bottle manufacturer known as Vetreria Etrusca has joined Spearhead Global's Pioneer Program. This collaboration includes the release of an innovative co-branded catalog and a pledge for research and development investment. The announcement was made in YARDLEY, Pa. in December.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: We have serious concerns with China's behavior on national security and economics, but it is important to have open channels of communication.
BoC's Senior Dep. Gov. Rogers: We've seen a pretty big uptick in housing activity without an uptick in prices, which is good news.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Most of the depreciation in the Canadian dollar is in fact an appreciation of US dollar. The Canadian dollar compared to other major currencies shows very little change.
Bioplastics market projected to reach $19.43 billion by 2031, driving growth opportunities for industry stakeholders.
news.summary: The recent report from The Insight Partners offers crucial insights for various stakeholders involved in the bioplastics industry. This includes details on raw material suppliers, manufacturers of bioplastics, as well as distributors and suppliers. These insights are essential for navigating the dynamic market landscape and capitalizing on emerging opportunities within the industry. This information aims to support stakeholders in making informed decisions and driving growth in this sector, which is estimated to reach a market value of billions of dollars in the upcoming years.

news.headline: InventHelp inventors create TRANS-CARRY luggage cart for wheelchair users, making travel easier.----------</8
news.summary: Two inventors, based in Miami, Fla., created TRANS-CARRY to enhance travel for wheelchair users. The innovative design allows users to conveniently transport their luggage without the need for additional support. This new product aims to provide a safer and more efficient way for wheelchair users to carry their belongings. The invention was introduced on Dec. 11, 2024, in Pittsburgh.

news.headline: Epoxy Curing Agents market expected to reach $8.9 billion by 2031 due to rising demand for high-performance materials.
news.summary: In Lewes, Delaware on December 11, 2024, the Epoxy Curing Agents market is experiencing growth due to rising demand for resilient, top-quality materials in sectors like construction, automotive, and electronics. These agents boost strength, heat resistance, and chemical resilience, catering to the need for long-lasting and reliable products.

news.headline: Mattamy Homes buys 49 acres in Marana, AZ for $1.9 million, plans Solaire at Silverbell Ridge community.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, on December 11, 2024, Mattamy Homes, the leading privately owned homebuilder in North America, acquired 49 acres of land in Marana for $1.9 million. This purchase was finalized on December 10. The new development named Solaire at Silverbell Ridge will be established on this plot of land.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem: The unemployment rate has gone up, but we have not seen widespread job losses as you would typically see in a recession.
Influencers promoting memecoin scams could face legal consequences due to laws on social media crypto promotions; Kim Kardashian fined $1.26M.
news.summary: Elon Musk faces no penalties for promoting Dogecoin through social media, while Kim Kardashian incurred a $1.26 million fine. This discrepancy in treatment highlights the varying regulations surrounding endorsing cryptocurrency on online platforms.

news.headline: EarthTronics introduces 45.8-inch, 12.5W LED T5 fixture with 5 color options for architectural use, operating on 120-277V.
news.summary: Based in Norton Shores, Michigan, EarthTronics has launched the EarthBulb Type B Direct Wire Linear LED T5, a 45.8-inch lighting solution that consumes 12.5 watts of power. This product offers five color options to cater to different architectural needs. It operates without the requirement of an electronic ballast or driver and functions efficiently on voltages ranging from 120 to 277V. The EarthBulb Type B delivers 1800 lumens of brightness, contributing to energy conservation and environmental sustainability by providing the appropriate lighting for specific applications.

news.headline: Extraordinary General Meeting of EPSO-G shareholders convened per Board decision.EPSO-G legal entity code: 302826889.
news.summary: The Extraordinary General Meeting of shareholders of Energy Transmission and Exchange Group EPSO-G (legal entity code 302826889, located at Laisvės pr. 10, Vilnius, Lithuania) has been scheduled following the initiative and resolution of the Board.

news.headline: BoC's Gov. Macklem addressing threat of US tariffs: We can't run policy on something that might happen.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: If tariffs were implemented as promised, they would be highly disruptive to the Canadian economy.
Hershey's main shareholder declines Mondelez's bid for being too low. (HSY, MDLZ)
US Treasury Secretary Yellen: The US is looking for creative ways to reduce Russia's oil revenues.
US Treasury Secretary Yellen: Softer oil offers the possibility for more action on Russia.
US Treasury Secretary Yellen: The oil market seems well supplied, and prices are relatively low.
MITRE releases latest results from ATT&CK® Evaluations for cybersecurity solutions against ransomware.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, and Bedford, Massachusetts, the most recent results from the ATT&CK® Evaluations have been released. These evaluations by MITRE provide a thorough and impartial evaluation of enterprise cybersecurity solutions.

news.headline: Equity shares to be issued, worth $1 million, to support business growth and expansion plans.
